page_metadata.biotools__summary: An integrative database of germ-line variable genes from the immunoglobulin loci of human and mouse. All variable gene sequences are extracted from the EMBL-Bank.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: An integrative database of germ-line variable genes from the immunoglobulin loci of human and mouse. All variable gene sequences are extracted from the EMBL-Bank.
